violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown and black residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets of the front lowboy units were observed in poor repair. Gaskets are to be replaced. Lower shelf of the small refrigerator observed in poor repair. Coating fas peeled away resulting in rusted areas. These areas are not cleanable. Lower shelf is to be replaced or repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
